revision.comment: Reverted edit by [[Special:Contribs/24.43.239.146|24.43.239.146]] ([[User talk:24.43.239.146|talk]]) to last version by Annh07
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
1 revision imported: Fixing my edit mistake that put this category on numerous templates it did not belong on
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/Manhatthien98|Manhatthien98]] ([[User talk:Manhatthien98|talk]]) to last version by Codename Noreste
1 revision imported: importing to remove the ns-draft links
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Reverted edit by [[Special:Contribs/~2026-23350-0|~2026-23350-0]] ([[User talk:~2026-23350-0|talk]]) to last version by 8BitBros
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515111839|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
